ticket_title: Keep-Alive Login Automation Failing (17 Consecutive Failures)
label: good
notes: Clean investigation. QA identified root cause (rate limiting), CTO approved workaround (switch to Python API health check). No code changes needed.

ticket_title: [P0] N+1 Query Pattern Causing Slow Dashboard Loads
label: acceptable
notes: QA found and fixed ambiguous column reference bug during testing. Performance exceeded targets (5.3x vs 3x goal). Bug found during QA counts as minor rework.

ticket_title: [P1] Implement Monitoring Exemption for Rate Limiting
label: good
notes: Clean first-pass implementation. Demo mode approach was simple and effective. QA verified all criteria including browser testing.

ticket_title: [P2] Add Authentication Debug Logging
label: good
notes: Clean implementation. 24/24 tests passing. Exceeded requirements (27 logging statements vs 18 planned). No security issues.

ticket_title: Move cookie section to bottom of ChurnPilot app
label: good
notes: Clean first-pass. CSS fixed positioning with localStorage persistence. QA verified mobile responsive design.

ticket_title: Fix login button transition - temporary login section appears top right
label: good
notes: Clean fix. QA tested 3 times with consistent results. Loading overlay approach works reliably.

ticket_title: Duplicate element key error with 20+ cards in Action Required tab
label: failed
notes: First fix (add period to key) was approved and deployed but still broken for accounts with duplicate benefit names. CEO reported issue persisting. QA only tested demo mode, never authenticated with 25-card account. Second fix (add credit_idx) resolved it. Approved code was broken for real users.

ticket_title: Sidebar collapse/expand and cookie banner UX issues
label: poor
notes: 4 implementation attempts. Attempt 1: st.markdown (JS doesn't execute). Attempt 2: components.html (elements in DOM but not visible). Attempt 3: same issue on dashboard. Attempt 4: native Streamlit (JJ's Option 2). Escalated to CEO for decision.

ticket_title: Fix: Incorrect daily extraction limit display (shows 999 instead of 2)
label: good
notes: Clean 2-line fix. QA verified both demo and authenticated modes. Format matches CEO requirement.

ticket_title: Implement /health/capabilities SCHP endpoint
label: acceptable
notes: QA caught schema drift between health.py (correct) and health_api.py (separate implementation with missing fields). Fix was simple: wire health_api.py to call get_capability_status(). Good QA catch.

ticket_title: Implement /hooks/disable-ai webhook receiver
label: good
notes: Comprehensive implementation. 27/27 unit tests. Security verified (HMAC constant-time comparison, fail-closed auth, fail-open UI). All 10 success criteria met.

ticket_title: Bug: Benefit status inconsistency between Dashboard and Action Required tabs
label: acceptable
notes: Code fix was correct on first attempt. 3 QA rounds because: QA1 passed code review only (no browser), CTO rejected QA for fabricating justification to skip browser testing, QA2 was proper browser test that found pre-existing bug (separate issue #57). Code quality was fine; QA process was the issue.

ticket_title: Bug: Action Required checkbox writes last_used_period=NULL
label: acceptable
notes: Engineer timed out before committing; CTO rescued uncommitted changes. Fix itself was correct (replace stale-reference write path with optimistic_update). QA verified with 186/186 tests and direct DB query. Minor process issue (timeout rescue).

ticket_title: Refactor: Extract CSS/Design System from app.py
label: good
notes: Clean extraction of ~540 lines CSS into design_system.py. Also fixed P0 bug (st.rerun after callbacks). 38/38 tests passing. Visual regression check passed.

ticket_title: Bug: Duplicate benefits appearing in Action Required page
label: poor
notes: Multiple rounds. Code fix approved but CEO kept seeing duplicates. Confusion about deployment source (wrong repo), database investigation errors (wrong user ID), and the actual root cause (Cartesian product in JOINs) took many iterations to resolve.

ticket_title: Bug: Sidebar disappears after tab close/reopen
label: poor
notes: 6 fix versions (v1-v6). CEO kept reporting issue persisting. QA used wrong experiment endpoint multiple times. Root causes: CSS conflict, session state issues, Streamlit design token override. Approved multiple times before being truly fixed.

ticket_title: Bug: AttributeError in dismiss_annual_fee
label: poor
notes: First CTO approval had incorrect deployment blocker information. CEO reported still broken. Root cause: callback used local storage var instead of session_state. Approved code was functionally broken.

ticket_title: Bug: Benefit checkbox status fails to save and doesn't sync across tabs
label: failed
notes: 8 fix versions (v1-v8). CEO reported issue persisting after EACH approval. Root causes evolved: thread-unsafe singleton DB → Pydantic validation error → Streamlit module caching → cross-tab state conflict. Multiple CTO approvals on broken code. Most problematic ticket in the pipeline.

ticket_title: QA: Review and expand user journey test coverage
label: acceptable
